# Purpose
_Overview of business goal; don't assume familiarity, but be succinct._

# Implementation
_A general direction for reviewing engineers. Link to the relevant `design.md` for full context._
_Don't just list commits or changed files — explain the nature of the change and any non-obvious decisions._

# OpenSpec Change
_Name of the OpenSpec change and path to archived artifacts._
_e.g. `add-auth` — artifacts at `openspec/changes/archive/RAD-0000/add-auth/`_

# Demo
_Add screenshots, gifs, or recordings of your changes in action if applicable._
